text.title: US / UK / EU Compliance Matrix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: DPA + SCCs (EEA) or IDTA (UK); GDPR/UK-GDPR obligations
CCPA obligations active; sales-tax registration required

branch.when: feature uses AI AND serves EU users
branch.conclusion: tag risk; high-risk requires conformity assessment + registration
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Customer jurisdiction? → matches branch "jurisdiction == EEA OR UK" → conclusion ref=r3-contract-template-per-buyer-type
